items.hook: Before you sign anything, check your exact stamp duty and ABSD
items.caption: Before you sign anything, check your exact stamp duty and ABSD. Takes a minute, costs nothing. Free tools at propsight.sg, link in bio.
items.cap_zh: 签合同之前，先把印花税和 ABSD 算清楚。花不了几分钟，完全免费。免费工具在 propsight.sg，链接在简介。

items.hook: Save this before you start viewing
items.caption: Save this before you start viewing. Most buyers overlook the small stuff, and that can swing things by thousands either way. Sort it all out free at propsight.sg, link in bio.
items.cap_zh: 去看房之前先把这个存好。很多买家都会忽略小细节，但这些细节随时可以左右好几千块。全部免费搞清楚，propsight.sg，链接在简介。

items.hook: This is what each HDB flat type has been selling for lately, so you can see exactly how
items.caption:
This is what each HDB flat type has been selling for lately, so you can see exactly how far your budget goes. No guesswork. Check any block free at propsight.sg, link in bio.

Save this before you view.
items.cap_zh:
这是各类HDB单位最近的实际成交价，让你一眼看清预算能买到什么。不用瞎猜。到propsight.sg免费查任何一栋，链接在简介。

看房前先存起来。

items.hook: Woodlands right now: median 4-room resale sits around $510k, gross yield running about 6
items.caption:
Woodlands right now: median 4-room resale sits around $510k, gross yield running about 6.4%, and the amenities are genuinely there. Check any town yourself, free, at propsight.sg, link in bio.

Send this to someone deciding where to buy.
items.cap_zh:
Woodlands现在的情况：四房式HDB转售中位价约$510k，毛回报大概6.4%，生活配套也真的不错。想查哪个镇都可以，免费的，propsight.sg，链接在简介。

转发给还没决定买哪里的人。

items.hook: Private home prices edged up 0.5% in Q2 2026, but HDB resale flats have now fallen two q
items.caption:
Private home prices edged up 0.5% in Q2 2026, but HDB resale flats have now fallen two quarters straight. The two markets are pulling apart, and that changes the math depending on what you own or what you are buying. Check where your flat or condo stands using the free tools at propsight.sg, link in bio.

Know someone flat hunting? Send it their way.
items.cap_zh:
2026年第二季度，私人住宅价格上涨0.5%，而HDB转售组屋价格已连续两个季度下滑。两个市场正朝相反方向走，对condo业主和想买HDB转售的买家来说，影响各有不同。用propsight.sg的免费工具看看自己的房产现在处于什么位置，链接在简介。

认识正在找房的人？转给他。

items.hook: 5 grants first-time buyers quietly leave on the table.
items.caption: First-time buyers can stack more housing grants than most realise. Here are the ones people quietly miss. Check exactly what you qualify for, free, link in bio. Save this before you book.
items.cap_zh: 第一次买房，能拿的津贴比很多人想的多。这些是大家默默错过的。免费查你符合哪些，链接在简介。买房前先存起来。

items.hook: HDB landlords are out-earning condo landlords: 6.1% vs 3.6%.
items.caption:
Right now, an HDB resale flat returns about 6.1% gross for a landlord, versus about 3.6% for a private condo. Bigger price tag does not mean bigger yield. See the real numbers on any home, free, at propsight.sg, link in bio.

Worth saving before you talk to an agent.
items.cap_zh:
现在，组屋转售出租的毛回报大约 6.1%，私宅公寓大约 3.6%。房价高不代表回报高。免费查任何房子的真实数字，propsight.sg，链接在简介。

找中介前，值得先存下来。

items.hook: Your flat may be worth more than the agent says.
The PropSight tools are free to use.
